data.content:
The Metabo TKHS315C Portable Table Saw 240V (0103152038) is a robust, high-performance saw designed for workshops and construction sites. Its powerful 2000W induction motor, adjustable 315 mm blade, and sturdy steel table deliver accurate, smooth cuts in timber, boards, panels, and other wood-based materials with reliable, long-lasting performance.


Features:

  • Restart protection: prevents unintentional start-up after power supply interruption
  • Universal table saw with basic equipment
  • Ideal for sawing squared timber, boards, panels and wood-like materials in the workshop and at construction sites
  • Quiet induction motor with motor brake and overload protection - maintenance-free and robust
  • Universal guide with magnetic guide for precise straight cuts and mitre cuts
  • Freely height-adjustable saw blade
  • Comfortable setting of the saw blade inclination from the front
  • Sturdy, powder-coated sheet steel design and galvanised table-top
  • Foldable table length extension
  • Frame and motor pre-mounted

The Metabo 0901054940 Spiral Hose is a durable polyurethane (PA) air hose designed for reliable compressed air applications. Featuring a 6 mm x 8 mm diameter and 5 m working length, its coiled design minimizes tangling while providing flexibility and extended reach. Compatible with Euro fittings for efficient pneumatic tool connections.

Features:

  • Durable polyurethane (PA) construction provides excellent flexibility and long-lasting performance
  • Spiral coiled design prevents tangling and retracts neatly after use
  • 5 m working length offers extended reach for compressed air applications
  • 6 mm x 8 mm hose size ensures efficient airflow for pneumatic tools
  • Euro quick-connect fittings enable fast, secure, and reliable air hose connections

data.content:
The RIDGID Remote Transmitter 16728 is a compact 512 Hz sonde designed for accurate underground pipe and drain line locating. It attaches to drain cleaning cables or water jet hoses, while a flashing LED confirms transmission. Built for durability, it works seamlessly with RIDGID NaviTrack locating systems for dependable performance.

Features:

  • Constructed with solid-steel core, abrasion-resistant urethane coating, and stainless steel wear ring
  • Transmitting at 512 Hz frequency, it operates using one AAA-size alkaline battery
  • Used in conjunction with RIDGID line locator's, transmitter locates in various pipe materials at depths to 15 Ft.
  • RIDGID full lifetime warranty against material defects & workmanship

data.content:
The RIDGID Hand Threader Die Head 11-R RH NPT 2 in. (20943) delivers precise, reliable pipe threading for professional plumbing and industrial applications. Featuring durable alloy right-hand dies and a 2-inch NPT thread size, it ensures accurate thread cutting, long service life, and dependable performance with compatible RIDGID threading equipment.

Features:

  • 512 Hz transmitting frequency for accurate underground pipe and drain locating
  • Compatible with RIDGID NaviTrack® locating systems for reliable detection performance
  • Quick attachment to drain cleaning cables and water jet hoses for easy operation
  • Flashing LED indicator confirms active signal transmission during locating tasks
  • Compact, rugged construction withstands demanding jobsite conditions

The RIDGID 1435N Plastic Pipe Cutter (26821) delivers fast, clean, and accurate cuts on plastic pipe. Designed for PVC, CPVC, PP, PEX, PE, and rubber hose, it features an X-CEL® quick-change blade, ergonomic handle with pipe size markings, and burr-free cutting for efficient, professional-quality results on every job.

Features:

  • Ergonomic lower handle is subdivided into 1/2" units of measurement for quick determination of pipe size
  • X-CEL® quick-change blade
  • Burr-free cutting ensures a right-angled cut
  • Intended for: plastic (PVC, CPVC, PP, PEX, PE, rubber hose) and multilayer pipes

data.product_name: JCP Shield Anchor Loose Bolt 6 X 60mm Zinc Plated
data.taxonomy: Powertools & Machines > Cordless Power Tools > Table Saw and Cross Cuts
data.content:
The loose bolt shield anchor is a three-way expansion shield suitable for use in brick and concrete. The thick walls of the expanders give the anchor its exceptional grip and allow it to cater for oversized holes caused by powerful drills in weaker materials such as brickwork.

Features:

  • Zinc-plated finish provides enhanced corrosion resistance for extended service life
  • Expansion shield design delivers a secure and reliable fixing in solid masonry materials
  • Suitable for use in concrete, brick, and natural stone applications
  • 6 x 60 mm size is ideal for a wide range of medium-duty fastening tasks
  • Loose bolt design allows quick installation and easy replacement when required
  • Medium to heavy duty loads
  • Torque controlled expansion
  • All Steel Anchor

data.product_name: JCP Drive Screw  Frame Fixing Zinc Plated 8 x 60mm
data.taxonomy: Powertools & Machines > Cordless Power Tools > Table Saw and Cross Cuts
data.content:
The JCP Drive Screw Frame Fixing Zinc Plated 8 x 60 mm (NFF08060) is a reliable fixing solution designed for securing frames, battens, and structural components to concrete, brick, and masonry. Manufactured from durable steel with a corrosion-resistant zinc-plated finish, it provides dependable performance in indoor applications. The drive screw design enables quick, straightforward installation while ensuring a strong and secure hold. Ideal for window and door frames, timber battens, metal profiles, and general construction work, this frame fixing offers excellent stability, durability, and long-lasting performance for professional builders, contractors, and maintenance projects.

Features:

  • For use in solid base materials
  • Strong grip in weaker materials
  • High-expansion ratio
  • Countersunk head gives a flush finish
  • Through fixing
  • Ribbed plug manufactured from polyamide PA6 nylon

data.product_name: TX504 Extreme Turbotorch Gas Trigger Torch
data.taxonomy: Powertools & Machines > Cordless Power Tools > Table Saw and Cross Cuts
data.content:
TurboTorch has developed a new series of hand torches that also feature Extreme Swirl Technology. The new Extreme series generates more heat than other hand torches for faster brazing times and less gas consumption. All Extreme series hand torches and tips feature TurboTorch swirl combustion. Higher heat levels, in a short amount of time, enable the pros to quickly complete the job.

Features:

  • Powerful turbo flame delivers concentrated heat for fast heating and soldering applications.
  • Instant trigger ignition enables quick, safe, and convenient one-handed operation.
  • Ergonomic handle provides a comfortable, secure grip during prolonged use.
  • Durable construction ensures reliable performance in demanding professional environments.
  • Ideal for plumbing, brazing, soldering, and general heating applications with compatible gas cylinders.

data.content:
SWP Variable Shade Auto-Darkening Welding Helmet – Black is a reliable and easy-to-use welding helmet designed for everyday fabrication, featuring variable shade control and TIG capability for versatile workshop applications.

Designed for general welding and fabrication work, this SWP auto-darkening helmet provides dependable protection across MIG, TIG and MMA welding applications. The variable shade range allows users to adapt the helmet to different welding conditions, while the fast switching speed helps maintain visibility and safety.

With TIG welding capability from as low as 5 amps, the helmet is suitable for light fabrication and precision work. Adjustable sensitivity and delay controls allow users to fine-tune performance, while the integrated grinding function enables quick switching between welding and preparation tasks.

The lightweight design and comfortable headgear ensure ease of use throughout the working day, making it a practical solution for workshop and site environments.

Features:

  • Variable shade 4-9 / 9-13 auto-darkening filter
  • TIG welding capability from 5 amps
  • Grinding function for multi-process use
  • Stepless adjustable sensitivity and delay
  • Lightweight, comfortable design for extended use
data.tech_spec:
• Product Type:Auto-Darkening Welding Helmet
  • Viewing Area:90 x 40 mm
  • Filter Dimensions:110 x 90 mm
  • Optical Classification:1/1/1/2
  • Light Shade:4
  • Dark Shade Range:4–9 / 9–13
  • Switching Time:0.08 ms
  • Delay Time:0.1–0.9 s
  • Sensors:2
  • Sensitivity Control:Stepless Adjustable
  • Grinding Function:Yes
  • Minimum TIG Current:5A
  • UV/IR Protection:DIN 15

data.content:
The SWP Outer Lens 118 x 97 mm (5 Pack) STEALTH XG-ADPRO (3026) is a high-quality replacement protective lens designed for STEALTH XG-ADPRO welding helmets. Manufactured from durable, optically clear material, it shields the auto-darkening filter from sparks, spatter, scratches, and debris, helping to maintain clear vision and extend helmet service life. Measuring 118 x 97 mm, these outer lenses provide a precise fit for compatible helmets and are quick to replace when worn or damaged. Supplied in a convenient pack of five, they are ideal for professional welding, fabrication, and industrial maintenance environments.

Features:

  • Designed specifically for STEALTH XG-ADPRO welding helmets for a precise and secure fit
  • Protects the auto-darkening filter from sparks, weld spatter, scratches, and debris
  • Optically clear construction maintains excellent visibility during welding operations
  • 118 x 97 mm replacement lens installs quickly for minimal downtime
  • Supplied in a convenient pack of five for long-lasting workshop and jobsite use

data.product_name: Weldass Blk Bandana Flame Retardant Cotton
data.taxonomy: Powertools & Machines > Cordless Power Tools > Table Saw and Cross Cuts
data.content:
The Weldas Black Bandana Flame Retardant Cotton (23-3615) is designed to provide reliable head protection and comfort for welders and industrial professionals working in high-heat environments. Manufactured from flame-retardant cotton, it helps reduce exposure to sparks, spatter, and radiant heat while remaining lightweight and breathable for extended wear. The adjustable tie-back design ensures a secure, comfortable fit for most head sizes and fits easily beneath welding helmets and safety headgear. Ideal for welding, fabrication, metalworking, and maintenance tasks, this durable bandana offers dependable protection, comfort, and long-lasting performance in demanding workplace conditions.

Features:

  • One size fits all
  • Often used in combination with helmet
  • High comfort and flexibility
  • Sweatband integrated in the front of the Doo-Rag
  • 305 gr./m² flame retardant cotton

The Metabo Polishing Paste White 250 g (623520000) is a premium polishing compound formulated to produce a smooth, high-gloss finish on metal and other compatible surfaces. Designed for use with polishing wheels and buffing accessories, it effectively removes fine scratches, oxidation, and surface imperfections while enhancing the material’s natural shine. Its consistent formulation ensures even application and reliable polishing performance, making it suitable for workshop, fabrication, and maintenance tasks. Supplied in a convenient 250 g bar, this polishing paste is ideal for professional tradespeople and DIY users seeking high-quality finishing results with minimal effort.

Features:

  • Produces a smooth, high-gloss finish on metal and other compatible surfaces
  • Effectively removes fine scratches, oxidation, and minor surface imperfections
  • Designed for use with polishing wheels and buffing accessories
  • Consistent polishing compound ensures even application and reliable results
  • Supplied in a convenient 250 g bar for professional and DIY polishing applications
